title: lappula redowskii f. cupulata
intro: Lappula redowskii f. cupulata, also known as Russian bugloss, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing coughs, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. Lappula redowskii f. cupulata is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its dried leaves and flowers can be used in infusions for respiratory issues, as well as in topical applications for skin irritations.
